root.name: B.Tech
root.description: Career paths for B.Tech in India

children.name: Software Development
children.description: Core software engineering roles across frontend, backend, and full-stack.

children.name: Frontend Engineer
children.description: Craft user interfaces using React, Vue, or Angular.
children.roadmap: Learn HTML/CSS/JS deep dive. Master React and Next.js. Build a portfolio.

children.name: UI/UX Developer
children.description: Bridge the gap between design and engineering.
children.roadmap: Learn design principles alongside frontend code. Study WCAG guidelines.

children.name: Backend Engineer
children.description: Build APIs, microservices, and databases.
children.roadmap: Master one backend language. Understand relational databases and caching.

children.name: AI & Data Science
children.description: Extract insights and build models for machine learning.

children.name: Data Scientist
children.description: Analyze data and build predictive models.
children.roadmap: Learn Python data stack. Study statistics. Build portfolio on Kaggle.

children.name: ML Engineer
children.description: Deploy and maintain ML models in production.
children.roadmap: Understand ML concepts and combine them with DevOps practices.

children.name: Product & Design
children.description: Lead product development and user experience.

children.name: Product Manager
children.description: Own the product roadmap and user requirements.
children.roadmap: Transition from engineering or get an MBA. Understand business metrics.

children.name: Cloud & DevOps
children.description: Manage infrastructure and deployment pipelines.

children.name: DevOps Engineer
children.description: Automate CI/CD and infrastructure.
children.roadmap: Learn Linux. Master containers (Docker/K8s). Get cloud certifications.

children.name: Research & Academia
children.description: Pursue higher studies or research roles.

children.name: M.Tech / M.S.
children.description: Higher education in specialized fields.
children.roadmap: Prepare for exams. Maintain high CGPA. Select thesis topic carefully.

children.name: Entrepreneurship
children.description: Start your own tech company.

children.name: Tech Founder
children.description: Build a product and acquire customers.
children.roadmap: Find a co-founder. Build MVP. Apply to YC or raise angel funds.

root.name: B.Tech
root.description: Career paths for B.Tech in India

children.name: Structural Engineering
children.description: Design and monitor structural integrity of buildings and bridges.

children.name: Design Engineer
children.description: Use software to model structures.
children.roadmap: Learn relevant CAD software. Understand structural load codes.

children.name: Construction Management
children.description: Oversee construction projects.

children.name: Project Manager
children.description: Ensure projects are delivered on time and budget.
children.roadmap: Start as site engineer. Get PMP certification.

children.name: Urban Planning
children.description: Plan cities and infrastructure networks.

children.name: Urban Planner
children.description: Design sustainable city models.
children.roadmap: Get master's in urban planning. Work with municipal authorities.

children.name: Environmental Engineering
children.description: Manage water, waste, and sustainable infrastructure.

children.name: Environmental Consultant
children.description: Ensure compliance with environmental standards.
children.roadmap: Specialize in environmental systems. Join consulting firms.

children.name: Government & PSU
children.description: Stable engineering roles in government sectors.

children.name: IES Officer
children.description: Serve in Indian Engineering Services.
children.roadmap: Prepare for UPSC ESE. Extremely competitive.

children.name: Consulting
children.description: Advisory roles for infrastructure project investments.

children.name: Infra Consultant
children.description: Financial and structural advisory for large projects.
children.roadmap: MBA adds value. Join Big 4 or infrastructure advisory firms.

Learn ML basics -> Deep learning -> Work on real datasets -> Optimize models

Learn Python -> Study ML algorithms -> Build projects -> Learn deployment (Flask/Docker)

Strong math -> Research internships -> Publish papers -> Masters/PhD

children.name: Data Scientist

Learn analytics -> Business understanding -> Dashboarding
Learn Python -> Statistics -> ML -> Build projects -> Kaggle

Learn SQL -> Visualization tools -> Business cases

Learn backend -> Learn cloud -> Deploy apps
Learn backend language -> Build APIs -> Work with DB

children.description: Work across frontend and backend.

children.description: Specialize in MongoDB, Express, React, Node.
children.roadmap: Learn JS -> React -> Node -> Build apps
Learn frontend -> Backend -> Build full projects

children.name: DevOps Engineer
children.description: Automate deployment pipelines and infrastructure.

children.name: Site Reliability Engineer
children.description: Ensure system uptime and performance.
children.roadmap: Learn DevOps -> Monitoring -> Scaling

children.name: Platform Engineer
children.description: Build internal developer platforms.
children.roadmap: Learn infra -> Automate systems -> Build platforms
Learn Linux -> Docker -> CI/CD -> Cloud

children.description: Protecting systems, networks, and data from cyber threats.

children.name: Security Engineer
children.description: Build secure systems and prevent vulnerabilities.

children.name: Bug Bounty Hunter

Learn hacking basics -> Practice CTFs -> Certifications
Learn networking -> Security basics -> Practice labs

children.name: Finance & Quant
children.description: Applying AI and data science in financial markets and investments.

children.name: Quantitative Analyst
children.description: Build mathematical models for trading and risk.

children.name: Algorithmic Trader
children.description: Develop automated trading systems.

children.name: Portfolio Quant
children.description: Optimize portfolios and manage risk.
children.roadmap: Learn portfolio theory -> Build tools
Learn trading -> Build strategies -> Backtest
Learn math -> Finance basics -> Build models

children.name: Product & Management
children.description: Leading product strategy, development, and execution.

children.name: Product Manager
children.description: Define product vision and coordinate teams.

children.name: AI Product Manager
children.description: Manage AI-based products.

children.name: Technical Product Manager
children.description: Focus on deeply technical products.
children.roadmap: Learn tech -> Product thinking -> Lead projects
Learn AI + Product -> Build AI products
Learn product basics -> Work on projects -> Internships

root.name: Interior Design
root.description: Career paths for Interior Design in India

children.name: Interior Design Practice
children.description: Designing functional and aesthetic indoor spaces for residential and commercial environments.

children.name: Interior Designer
children.description: Plan and design interior layouts, materials, lighting, and decor.

children.name: Residential Interior Designer
children.description: Focus on homes, apartments, and living spaces.

children.name: Luxury Home Designer
children.description: Design high-end residences with premium aesthetics.
children.roadmap: Gain experience -> Work with premium clients -> Build brand
Study residential layouts -> Work on small projects -> Build portfolio

children.name: Commercial Interior Designer
children.description: Design offices, retail stores, and public spaces.

children.name: Retail Space Designer
children.description: Design stores to enhance customer experience.
children.roadmap: Study retail psychology -> Work on store layouts
Learn commercial layouts -> Work on office/retail projects
Learn design fundamentals -> Master design tools -> Build portfolio -> Internships

children.name: Visualization & 3D Design
children.description: Creating realistic visual representations of interior spaces before execution.

children.name: 3D Visualizer
children.description: Develop 3D models and renderings of interior designs.

children.name: Architectural Visualizer
children.description: Create detailed 3D visuals for architectural and interior projects.

children.name: Animation Visualizer
children.description: Create walkthrough animations for projects.
children.roadmap: Learn animation tools -> Build walkthroughs
Learn rendering -> Work on real projects -> Improve realism

children.name: VR/AR Designer
children.description: Design immersive interior experiences using virtual reality.
children.roadmap: Learn XR tools -> Build immersive environments
Learn 3D tools -> Practice rendering -> Build portfolio

children.name: Furniture & Product Design
children.description: Designing furniture and interior products for functionality and aesthetics.

children.name: Furniture Designer
children.description: Design custom furniture pieces for interiors.

children.name: Modular Furniture Designer
children.description: Design space-saving and modular furniture.

children.name: Kitchen Designer
children.description: Specialize in modular kitchen layouts.
children.roadmap: Learn kitchen ergonomics -> Work with vendors
Study modular systems -> Build practical designs

children.name: Industrial Furniture Designer
children.description: Design furniture for mass production.
children.roadmap: Learn manufacturing -> Work with factories
Learn design principles -> Build prototypes -> Work with manufacturers

children.name: Sustainable & Green Design
children.description: Designing eco-friendly and energy-efficient interior spaces.

children.name: Sustainable Interior Designer
children.description: Create environmentally responsible interiors.

children.name: LEED Consultant
children.description: Help projects meet green building standards.

children.name: Energy Efficient Designer
children.description: Focus on optimizing lighting and energy use.
children.roadmap: Learn energy systems -> Apply in projects
Get LEED certified -> Work on green projects
Learn sustainability -> Study materials -> Get certifications

children.name: Project Management & Execution
children.description: Managing execution of interior projects from concept to completion.

children.name: Interior Project Manager
children.description: Oversee project timelines, budgets, and execution.

children.name: Site Supervisor
children.description: Supervise on-site construction and implementation.

children.name: Contractor / Freelancer
children.description: Handle independent interior execution projects.
children.roadmap: Build network -> Take freelance projects
Work on sites -> Learn execution
Gain design experience -> Learn management -> Lead projects

children.name: Styling & Creative Direction
children.description: Enhancing interiors through decor, styling, and aesthetics.

children.name: Interior Stylist
children.description: Focus on decor elements like furniture, colors, and accessories.

children.name: Set Designer
children.description: Design sets for films, TV, and events.

children.name: Event Designer
children.description: Design interiors for events and exhibitions.
children.roadmap: Work on events -> Build portfolio
Learn design -> Work in media industry
Learn styling -> Build portfolio -> Work with brands

children.name: Entrepreneurship & Freelancing
children.description: Starting your own design firm or working independently.

children.name: Interior Design Entrepreneur
children.description: Run your own design studio or firm.

children.name: Freelance Interior Designer
children.description: Work independently on client projects.

children.name: Online Design Consultant
children.description: Provide remote interior design services.
children.roadmap: Build online presence -> Offer virtual services
Build portfolio -> Get clients -> Scale projects
Gain experience -> Build network -> Start firm

root.name: Computer Science
root.description: Career paths for Computer Science in USA

children.name: Software Development & Engineering
children.description: Designing, building, and maintaining software systems ranging from web apps to large-scale distributed systems.

children.name: Full Stack Developer
children.description: Develops both frontend interfaces and backend systems, enabling complete application development from UI to database.

children.name: Frontend Engineering
children.description: Focuses on building user interfaces, improving UX, and ensuring responsive, accessible web applications.

children.name: UI Performance Specialist
children.description: Optimizes frontend applications for speed, responsiveness, and scalability across devices.
children.roadmap: Learn performance metrics -> Optimize real apps -> Study browser internals -> Work on large-scale apps
Master JS fundamentals -> Learn React ecosystem -> Build UI-heavy projects -> Optimize performance

children.name: Backend Engineering
children.description: Builds server-side logic, APIs, and database architecture ensuring scalability and reliability.

children.name: Distributed Systems Engineer
children.description: Designs scalable systems that handle millions of users using microservices and cloud infrastructure.
children.roadmap: Learn backend deeply -> Study distributed systems -> Work with cloud infra -> Build scalable projects
Learn backend basics -> Build APIs -> Study DB optimization -> Learn system design
Learn HTML/CSS/JS -> Master React + Node -> Build full-stack projects -> Deploy apps -> Apply for internships/jobs

children.name: Mobile App Developer
children.description: Builds applications for iOS and Android platforms focusing on performance and user experience.

children.name: iOS Development
children.description: Develops apps specifically for Apple devices using Swift and Apple frameworks.

children.name: AR iOS Developer
children.description: Builds augmented reality experiences using Apple’s ARKit framework.
children.roadmap: Learn AR basics -> Build AR apps -> Integrate 3D assets -> Optimize performance
Learn Swift -> Build iOS apps -> Use Apple APIs -> Publish on App Store
Learn platform basics -> Build mobile apps -> Publish apps -> Optimize performance

children.name: Data & Artificial Intelligence
children.description: Extracting insights from data and building intelligent systems using machine learning and statistical methods.

children.name: Data Scientist
children.description: Analyzes large datasets to extract insights and build predictive models for decision-making.

children.name: Machine Learning Engineer
children.description: Designs and deploys machine learning models into production systems.

children.name: AI Research Engineer
children.description: Works on cutting-edge AI models, often contributing to research papers and advanced innovations.
children.roadmap: Strong math foundation -> Study research papers -> Build novel models -> Publish work
Learn ML theory -> Build models -> Learn deployment -> Work on real datasets

children.name: Data Analyst
children.description: Focuses on data visualization, reporting, and deriving business insights from structured datasets.

children.name: Business Intelligence Analyst
children.description: Bridges business and data by translating data insights into strategic decisions.
children.roadmap: Learn BI tools -> Work on business datasets -> Build dashboards
Learn SQL + visualization tools -> Analyze datasets -> Create dashboards
Learn Python + stats -> Work on datasets -> Build ML models -> Create portfolio projects

children.name: Cybersecurity
children.description: Protecting systems, networks, and data from cyber threats and vulnerabilities.

children.name: Security Analyst
children.description: Monitors systems, detects threats, and ensures security compliance across networks.

children.name: Ethical Hacker
children.description: Identifies vulnerabilities in systems by simulating attacks to improve security defenses.

children.name: Red Team Specialist
children.description: Conducts advanced simulated cyberattacks to test organizational security defenses.
children.roadmap: Master pentesting -> Simulate real attacks -> Work on enterprise security
Learn networking deeply -> Practice hacking labs -> Earn CEH/OSCP

children.name: Security Engineer
children.description: Designs and implements secure systems and infrastructure to prevent attacks.

children.name: Cloud Security Engineer
children.description: Secures cloud-based applications and infrastructure using modern security practices.
children.roadmap: Learn cloud platforms -> Study security tools -> Implement secure architectures
Learn secure coding -> Study cloud security -> Implement security systems
Learn networking -> Study security basics -> Practice labs -> Get certifications

children.name: Systems & Infrastructure
children.description: Managing hardware, operating systems, networks, and cloud infrastructure.

children.name: DevOps Engineer
children.description: Bridges development and operations by automating deployment, monitoring, and scaling systems.

children.name: Site Reliability Engineer
children.description: Ensures high availability and performance of systems using automation and monitoring.

children.name: Platform Engineer
children.description: Builds internal platforms and tooling to improve developer productivity and system scalability.
children.roadmap: Learn infra deeply -> Build internal tools -> Optimize developer workflows
Learn system reliability -> Build monitoring systems -> Handle incidents

children.name: Cloud Engineer
children.description: Designs and manages cloud infrastructure and services for scalable applications.

children.name: Solutions Architect
children.description: Designs high-level cloud solutions tailored to business requirements.
children.roadmap: Learn architecture patterns -> Work on large systems -> Design scalable solutions
Learn cloud basics -> Get certifications -> Deploy apps on cloud
Learn Linux -> Master Docker/K8s -> Build CI/CD pipelines -> Work on cloud

root.name: Neurology
root.description: Career paths for Neurology in India

children.name: Clinical Neurology
children.description: The core clinical domain involving direct patient care, diagnosis, and treatment of neurological disorders. This is the primary path for MBBS graduates who wish to specialize in neurology through postgraduate training in India via NEET-PG and subsequent DM Neurology.

children.name: General Neurologist
children.description: A general neurologist diagnoses and manages a broad spectrum of neurological conditions including epilepsy, stroke, headache disorders, movement disorders, and neuromuscular diseases. Works in hospitals, clinics, or private practice.

children.name: Stroke Neurologist
children.description: Focuses exclusively on acute ischemic and hemorrhagic stroke management, thrombolysis, thrombectomy coordination, and stroke rehabilitation. Works in dedicated stroke units of tertiary hospitals.

children.name: Interventional Stroke Specialist
children.description: Works at the intersection of neurology and neuroradiology to perform mechanical thrombectomy and carotid stenting. Requires additional interventional training beyond DM Neurology.
children.roadmap: DM Neurology -> Fellowship in Neuro-intervention (SCTIMST/AIIMS) -> Join hybrid cath lab team -> Build independent caseload

children.name: Stroke Rehabilitation Specialist
children.description: Manages post-stroke recovery through coordinated multidisciplinary rehab involving physiotherapy, speech therapy, and occupational therapy. Often works in dedicated neuro-rehab centers.
children.roadmap: DM Neurology -> Fellowship/training in Neurorehabilitation -> Join rehab center or set up integrated neuro-rehab clinic
DM Neurology -> Fellowship in Stroke/Vascular Neurology (NIMHANS/AIIMS) -> Join stroke unit -> Build expertise in mechanical thrombectomy coordination

children.name: Epileptologist
children.description: Specializes in the diagnosis and management of seizure disorders, including drug-resistant epilepsy, epilepsy surgery workup, and long-term EEG monitoring. Critical in tertiary epilepsy centers.

children.name: Pediatric Epileptologist
children.description: Manages seizure disorders specifically in children including infantile spasms, Dravet syndrome, and neonatal seizures. Works closely with pediatric neurology teams.
children.roadmap: DM Neurology or DM Pediatric Neurology -> Fellowship in Pediatric Epilepsy -> Join pediatric neurology department

children.name: Epilepsy Surgery Coordinator
children.description: Coordinates pre-surgical epilepsy evaluation including SEEG, Wada test, and neuropsychological testing. Works as part of a multidisciplinary epilepsy surgery team.
children.roadmap: DM Neurology + Epilepsy Fellowship -> Join comprehensive epilepsy center -> Build multidisciplinary surgery team experience
DM Neurology -> Fellowship in Epilepsy (NIMHANS/SGPGI) -> Join epilepsy monitoring unit -> Build surgical epilepsy program

children.name: Movement Disorder Specialist
children.description: Focuses on Parkinson's disease, dystonia, tremors, chorea, and related conditions. Manages both medical and surgical (DBS) aspects of movement disorders in specialized clinics.

children.name: Deep Brain Stimulation (DBS) Specialist
children.description: Programs and manages patients with implanted DBS devices for Parkinson's, essential tremor, and dystonia. Works closely with neurosurgeons in a DBS program.
children.roadmap: Movement Disorder Fellowship -> Training at DBS center (NIMHANS/Medanta) -> Independent DBS programming certification -> Build DBS clinic
DM Neurology -> Fellowship in Movement Disorders (NIMHANS/CMC Vellore) -> Join movement disorder clinic -> Learn DBS programming
Complete MBBS -> Clear NEET-PG -> MD General Medicine (3 yrs) -> Clear NEET-SS -> DM Neurology (3 yrs) -> Hospital posting or private practice

children.name: Pediatric Neurologist
children.description: Specializes in neurological conditions affecting infants, children, and adolescents including cerebral palsy, neurodevelopmental disorders, childhood epilepsy, and genetic neurological diseases.

children.name: Neonatal Neurologist
children.description: Manages brain injury in newborns including hypoxic-ischemic encephalopathy, neonatal seizures, and intraventricular hemorrhage. Works in NICUs of tertiary hospitals.
children.roadmap: DM Pediatric Neurology -> Neonatal Neurology Fellowship -> Join NICU team at tertiary center -> Build dedicated neonatal neurology service

children.name: Neurodevelopmental Pediatrician
children.description: Evaluates and manages children with autism spectrum disorder, ADHD, intellectual disability, and learning disorders. Works in multidisciplinary developmental clinics.
children.roadmap: DM Pediatric Neurology -> Additional training in Neurodevelopment -> Join developmental clinic -> Build multidisciplinary team with psychologists and therapists
MBBS -> NEET-PG -> MD Pediatrics (3 yrs) -> NEET-SS -> DM Pediatric Neurology (3 yrs) -> Join pediatric hospital or academic center

children.name: Academic and Research
children.description: Careers focused on advancing neurological knowledge through research, teaching, and academic medicine. India has a growing neuroscience research ecosystem centered around NIMHANS, AIIMS, TIFR, and IISc.

children.name: Academic Neurologist / Professor
children.description: Combines clinical neurology with teaching and research at medical colleges. Responsible for training postgraduate students, conducting research, and contributing to clinical protocols.

children.name: Clinician-Scientist
children.description: Conducts translational research bridging bedside observations with laboratory discoveries. Applies for extramural grants from DST, ICMR, DBT, and international bodies like NIH Fogarty.

children.name: Neurogenetics Researcher
children.description: Studies genetic underpinnings of neurological diseases like familial ALS, hereditary ataxias, and Huntington's disease. Uses next-generation sequencing and gene therapy approaches.
children.roadmap: DM Neurology -> PhD in Neurogenetics (IISc/NIMHANS) -> Postdoc -> Faculty or industry R&D position

children.name: Neuroimaging Researcher
children.description: Uses advanced MRI techniques (fMRI, DTI, spectroscopy) to study brain connectivity, neurodegeneration, and psychiatric-neurological overlap. Collaborates with physicists and engineers.
children.roadmap: DM Neurology -> Research Fellowship in Neuroimaging -> PhD -> Join neuroimaging lab at NIMHANS/TIFR/IIT
DM Neurology -> PhD or postdoctoral research -> Faculty position at AIIMS/NIMHANS/IISc -> Apply for ICMR/DST grants -> Build research lab

children.salaryRange: 12L - 30L / yr (government medical college); 20L - 50L / yr (private deemed university)
children.roadmap: DM Neurology -> Junior Residency/Senior Residency at medical college -> Assistant Professor -> Associate Professor -> Professor & HOD

children.name: Basic Neuroscience Researcher
children.description: Pursues fundamental research into brain function, neuronal circuits, synaptic biology, and neurodegenerative mechanisms. Typically requires a PhD and is based in research institutes rather than hospitals.

children.name: Cellular and Molecular Neurobiologist
children.description: Studies neuronal signaling, synaptic plasticity, and molecular mechanisms of diseases like Alzheimer's and Parkinson's using cell and animal models.
children.roadmap: PhD in Neuroscience -> Postdoc at NCBS/TIFR -> Return fellowship (DBT/Ramanujan) -> Independent faculty position

children.name: Computational Neuroscientist
children.description: Builds mathematical and computational models of neural circuits and brain function. Bridges neuroscience with physics, mathematics, and computer science.
children.roadmap: MBBS + strong math background -> PhD in Computational Neuroscience (TIFR/IISc/IMSc) -> Postdoc -> Faculty or neurotech industry

children.salaryRange: 8L - 25L / yr (postdoc/faculty in India); 40L - 80L / yr (abroad postdoc returning)
children.roadmap: MBBS -> PhD in Neuroscience (TIFR/IISc/NBRC/CCMB) -> Postdoctoral fellowship (India or abroad) -> Faculty position at research institute

children.name: Neurosurgery Allied
children.description: Although neurosurgery is a separate MCh specialty, neurologists and MBBS graduates can work in closely allied roles that support or complement neurosurgical practice, including neuro-critical care and neuromonitoring.

children.name: Neurointensivist
children.description: Manages critically ill neurological and neurosurgical patients in the neuro-ICU. Handles raised intracranial pressure, status epilepticus, Guillain-Barre syndrome, and post-operative neurosurgical complications.

children.name: Neuro-ICU Director
children.description: Leads a dedicated neuro-intensive care unit, responsible for protocols, quality metrics, staff training, and complex case management in a tertiary neuroscience center.
children.roadmap: DM Neurology + Neurocritical Care Fellowship -> Senior neurointensivist -> ICU director role at large hospital
MBBS -> MD General Medicine or MD Anaesthesia -> DM Neurology or Fellowship in Neurocritical Care (NIMHANS/AIIMS) -> Join neuro-ICU

children.name: Intraoperative Neurophysiologist (IONM)
children.description: Monitors the functional integrity of the nervous system during neurosurgical, spinal, and vascular surgeries using real-time electrophysiological techniques to prevent intraoperative neurological injury.

children.name: Spine Surgery Neurophysiologist
children.description: Specializes in IONM during complex spinal deformity corrections, spinal tumor resections, and spinal vascular surgeries where cord injury risk is high.
children.roadmap: IONM training -> Specialize in spine cases -> Join spine surgery center (Apollo/Medanta/Kokilaben) -> Build independent spine IONM practice
MBBS -> DM Neurology or MD with neurophysiology training -> IONM certification (CNIM equivalent training) -> Join neurosurgery hospital team or start IONM consultancy

children.name: Neurodiagnostics and Technology
children.description: Careers centered around operating, interpreting, and innovating neurophysiological diagnostic technologies. This is a growing field as EEG, EMG, and sleep labs expand across India.

children.name: Clinical Neurophysiologist
children.description: Performs and interprets EEG, EMG/NCS, evoked potentials, and autonomic function tests. Works in hospital neurophysiology labs, diagnostic centers, or as a consultant.

children.name: Sleep Medicine Specialist
children.description: Diagnoses and manages sleep disorders including obstructive sleep apnea, narcolepsy, REM sleep behavior disorder, and insomnia. Conducts and interprets polysomnography.

children.name: Pediatric Sleep Specialist
children.description: Manages sleep problems specific to children including childhood obstructive sleep apnea, parasomnias, and sleep in neurodevelopmental conditions like autism and ADHD.
children.roadmap: DM Pediatric Neurology or DM Neurology -> Pediatric Sleep Fellowship -> Join pediatric sleep center
DM Neurology -> Fellowship in Sleep Medicine (AIIMS/PGI) or Indian Sleep Disorders Association training -> Set up sleep lab -> Build integrated sleep clinic
MBBS -> DM Neurology with neurophysiology focus -> Join EEG/EMG lab -> Build expertise in advanced neurodiagnostics

children.name: Neuroradiology (Diagnostic Support Role)
children.description: MBBS graduates interested in neuroimaging can pursue MD Radiology followed by fellowship in Neuroradiology, reading brain and spine MRI/CT for neurological conditions.

children.name: Interventional Neuroradiologist
children.description: Performs minimally invasive image-guided procedures including cerebral angiography, coiling of aneurysms, AVM embolization, and carotid angioplasty.
children.roadmap: MD Radiodiagnosis -> Fellowship in Interventional Neuroradiology (SCTIMST/AIIMS/Bombay Hospital) -> Join hybrid neuro-intervention suite
MBBS -> NEET-PG -> MD Radiodiagnosis (3 yrs) -> Fellowship in Neuroradiology (NIMHANS/AIIMS) -> Join neuroimaging department

children.name: Industry and Non-Clinical
children.description: Careers outside direct patient care that leverage the medical and neuroscience knowledge of MBBS graduates. These include pharma, medical devices, health technology, and regulatory roles.

children.name: Pharmaceutical Medical Affairs
children.description: Works within the medical affairs division of pharma companies managing CNS drug portfolios. Provides scientific support to sales teams, liaises with key opinion leaders, and contributes to clinical trial design.

children.name: CNS Clinical Trial Manager
children.description: Manages Phase II-IV clinical trials for CNS drugs including Alzheimer's, epilepsy, migraine, and MS therapeutics. Coordinates sites, monitors data, and ensures GCP compliance.

children.name: Regulatory Affairs Specialist (CNS)
children.description: Handles CDSCO submissions, IND/NDA dossier preparation, and ensures compliance for CNS drug approvals in India and international markets.
children.roadmap: MBBS -> Regulatory affairs certification (RAC) -> Join pharma regulatory team -> Senior regulatory manager -> Head of Regulatory Affairs
MBBS -> CRA/CRC role at CRO -> CNS-specific trial experience -> Clinical Trial Manager -> Head of Clinical Operations
MBBS -> 1-2 yrs clinical experience -> Join pharma as Medical Advisor (CNS) -> MBA or regulatory certification optional -> Senior Medical Affairs Manager -> Director

children.name: Neurotechnology and Health-Tech
children.description: Works with companies developing brain-computer interfaces, AI-powered EEG devices, neurostimulation products, digital therapeutics for neurological conditions, and teleneurology platforms.

children.name: Clinical AI Developer (Neurology)
children.description: Designs and validates AI algorithms for neurological applications including automated EEG seizure detection, stroke imaging triage, and Parkinson's tremor monitoring via wearables.

children.name: Digital Therapeutics Designer (Neurology)
children.description: Develops and validates software-based interventions for neurological conditions such as cognitive training apps for dementia, VR-based stroke rehab, or digital CBT for chronic pain.
children.roadmap: MBBS -> Product design or clinical research training -> Join DTx company -> Build clinical evidence for product -> Regulatory clearance pathway
MBBS -> Online ML/AI courses (Coursera/fast.ai) -> Join AI health startup -> Build validated clinical AI product -> Senior AI Scientist or CTO
MBBS -> Self-learn coding/ML basics -> Join neurotechnology startup as clinical lead -> MTech/MBA optional -> Product Manager or Clinical Science Director

children.name: Medical Writer / Science Communicator
children.description: Creates scientific and medical content for journals, pharma companies, patient advocacy groups, health media, and educational platforms in the neurology space.

children.name: Regulatory Medical Writer
children.description: Prepares clinical study reports, investigator brochures, and submission dossiers for CNS drugs for CDSCO, FDA, and EMA submissions. High attention to detail and regulatory knowledge essential.
children.roadmap: MBBS -> Regulatory writing training -> Join CRO/pharma regulatory writing team -> Senior regulatory writer -> Principal writer
MBBS -> AMWA/EMWA certification or self-training -> Join CRO or pharma as medical writer -> Build neurology niche portfolio -> Senior writer or Editorial Director

children.name: Global and Public Health
children.description: Careers addressing the burden of neurological disease at a population level through epidemiology, policy, global health programs, and international organizations.

children.name: Neuroepidemologist
children.description: Studies the distribution and determinants of neurological diseases in populations. Works on burden of disease studies, risk factor analysis, and prevention programs for conditions like stroke, epilepsy, and dementia.

children.name: Global Neurology Advocate
children.description: Works with international organizations like WHO, World Federation of Neurology, and Epilepsy Foundation to improve access to neurological care in low-resource settings including India's rural areas.
children.roadmap: MBBS -> MPH (TISS/Johns Hopkins/London School) -> Join global neurology NGO -> Build field program experience -> Senior WHO technical officer
MBBS -> MPH or MD Community Medicine -> Research fellowship in Neuroepidemiology -> Join ICMR/WHO/academic center -> Build national disease registry

children.name: Health Policy Analyst (Neurology)
children.description: Advises government bodies, think tanks, and health ministries on neurological disease burden, treatment gaps, insurance coverage, and drug access policy in India.

children.name: Health Technology Assessor
children.description: Evaluates the clinical and economic evidence for new neurological drugs, devices, and interventions to inform NPPA pricing decisions and insurance reimbursement under Ayushman Bharat.
children.roadmap: MBBS -> Masters in HTA or Health Economics -> Join HTAIn or NHSRC -> Build HTA dossiers for CNS drugs -> Senior HTA analyst or policy director
MBBS -> MPH or Masters in Health Policy (IIM/IIPH/abroad) -> Join health policy think tank or NITI Aayog -> Contribute to National Health Policy neurology chapter -> Senior health advisor

root.name: Corporate Finance
root.description: Career paths for Corporate Finance in India

children.name: Core Corporate Finance
children.description: Roles focused on managing a company’s financial health, including budgeting, forecasting, capital allocation, and strategic financial planning.

children.name: Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A)
children.description: Involves budgeting, forecasting, variance analysis, and supporting management with strategic financial insights.

children.name: Corporate FP&A Specialist
children.description: Works within large enterprises to manage financial planning cycles and performance tracking.

children.name: Strategic Finance Analyst
children.description: Supports long-term strategic decisions like expansion, pricing, and cost optimization using financial insights.
children.roadmap: Gain FP&A experience -> Work on business strategy projects -> Build executive-level reports -> Transition to strategy roles
Learn corporate finance concepts -> Work on monthly reports -> Automate dashboards -> Move into senior FP&A roles

children.name: Business Finance Partner
children.description: Works closely with business units to align financial goals with operational performance.

children.name: Commercial Finance Manager
children.description: Focuses on revenue, pricing strategies, and profitability optimization across products/services.
children.roadmap: Work in business finance -> Handle revenue streams -> Optimize pricing -> Transition to commercial leadership
Gain domain knowledge -> Work with cross-functional teams -> Provide decision support -> Move into leadership roles
Build strong accounting base -> Learn financial modeling -> Gain internship in finance team -> Master forecasting tools -> Transition into FP&A roles

children.name: Investment Banking & M&A
children.description: High-impact finance roles dealing with capital raising, mergers, acquisitions, and corporate restructuring.

children.name: Investment Banking Analyst/Associate
children.description: Works on financial modeling, pitch books, and deal execution for mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising.

children.name: Mergers & Acquisitions (M&A)
children.description: Focuses on advising companies on buying, selling, or merging businesses.

children.name: Deal Advisory Specialist
children.description: Executes transactions including financial structuring, valuation, and documentation.
children.roadmap: Gain IB experience -> Handle deal execution -> Build client relationships -> Move into leadership
Learn deal lifecycle -> Work on transactions -> Handle due diligence -> Move into senior M&A roles

children.name: Capital Markets
children.description: Deals with equity and debt issuance, IPOs, and investor relations.

children.name: Equity Capital Markets (ECM) Analyst
children.description: Works on IPOs and equity offerings, advising clients on raising funds through equity.
children.roadmap: Assist in IPO deals -> Learn regulatory processes -> Build expertise in equity markets -> Advance to ECM lead
Learn capital markets -> Work on IPOs/bond issuance -> Build investor relations expertise -> Advance to senior roles
Master valuation -> Build strong modeling skills -> Intern in IB firms -> Network aggressively -> Join IB roles

children.name: Corporate Treasury & Risk
children.description: Focuses on managing liquidity, cash flow, financial risks, and capital structure within organizations.

children.name: Treasury Analyst
children.description: Manages company cash flows, banking relationships, and short-term investments.

children.name: Corporate Treasury Manager
children.description: Oversees liquidity planning, funding strategies, and risk hedging for large organizations.

children.name: FX & Derivatives Specialist
children.description: Manages foreign exchange risk and derivative instruments for hedging exposures.
children.roadmap: Learn financial instruments -> Work in treasury teams -> Specialize in risk hedging -> Move into global treasury
Gain treasury experience -> Handle cash management -> Learn derivatives -> Move into managerial roles

children.name: Risk Management
children.description: Identifies and mitigates financial risks related to market, credit, and operations.

children.name: Enterprise Risk Manager
children.description: Oversees organization-wide risk strategies and ensures regulatory compliance.
children.roadmap: Gain risk experience -> Handle cross-functional risks -> Move into enterprise-level roles
Learn risk frameworks -> Work in risk teams -> Build models -> Move into senior risk roles
Learn treasury basics -> Work with banking operations -> Manage liquidity -> Move into treasury leadership

children.name: Private Equity & Venture Capital
children.description: Involves investing in private companies or startups, driving growth, and generating high returns.

children.name: Private Equity Analyst/Associate
children.description: Evaluates investment opportunities, conducts due diligence, and manages portfolio companies.

children.name: Growth Equity
children.description: Invests in scaling companies with high growth potential.

children.name: Portfolio Manager (PE)
children.description: Works with invested companies to drive growth and improve performance.
children.roadmap: Gain PE experience -> Manage investments -> Drive business growth -> Move to partner roles
Learn startup ecosystem -> Work on growth deals -> Build investment thesis -> Move into senior PE roles

children.name: Venture Capital
children.description: Focuses on early-stage startup investments and innovation-driven businesses.

children.name: VC Investment Associate
children.description: Sources deals, evaluates startups, and supports investment decisions.
children.roadmap: Build startup network -> Analyze pitch decks -> Assist partners -> Move into senior VC roles
Understand startup ecosystem -> Work with founders -> Evaluate deals -> Move into VC partner roles
Gain IB experience -> Transition to PE -> Analyze deals -> Manage portfolio companies

children.name: Consulting & Strategy Finance
children.description: Combines finance expertise with business strategy to solve complex organizational problems.

children.name: Financial Consultant
children.description: Advises companies on financial strategy, restructuring, and performance improvement.

children.name: Corporate Strategy Consultant
children.description: Works on high-level business decisions like expansion, acquisitions, and market entry.

children.name: Strategy & Transformation Lead
children.description: Leads large transformation projects involving financial restructuring and business change.
children.roadmap: Gain consulting experience -> Lead projects -> Manage teams -> Move into CXO-level roles
Gain consulting experience -> Work on strategy cases -> Build industry expertise -> Move into leadership

children.name: Restructuring & Turnaround
children.description: Focuses on improving distressed companies through financial restructuring.

children.name: Insolvency Professional
children.description: Handles bankruptcy processes and corporate insolvency cases under legal frameworks.
children.roadmap: Gain certification (IBBI) -> Work on insolvency cases -> Build expertise -> Lead restructuring mandates
Learn restructuring frameworks -> Work on distressed cases -> Build expertise -> Move into senior advisory
Join consulting firm -> Build analytical skills -> Work on client projects -> Move into senior consulting roles

root.name: Mechanical
root.description: Career paths for Mechanical in India

children.name: Core Mechanical Engineering
children.description: Traditional mechanical engineering roles involving design, analysis, manufacturing, and maintenance of machines and mechanical systems across industries.

children.name: Design Engineer
children.description: Responsible for designing mechanical components, machines, and systems using engineering principles and CAD tools.

children.name: Product Design Engineer
children.description: Designs consumer or industrial products focusing on functionality, aesthetics, and manufacturability.

children.name: Industrial Designer
children.description: Focuses on user-centric design, ergonomics, and product aesthetics in addition to engineering functionality.
children.roadmap: Develop creativity -> Learn design tools -> Build portfolio -> Work in design studios
Learn product design principles -> Build prototypes -> Work on real-world projects -> Join product companies

children.name: Automotive Design
children.description: Specializes in designing automotive components like engines, chassis, and vehicle systems.

children.name: Vehicle Design Engineer
children.description: Designs and optimizes vehicle components for performance, safety, and efficiency.
children.roadmap: Build automotive knowledge -> Work on simulation tools -> Gain industry exposure -> Move into OEM roles
Learn vehicle dynamics -> Work on automotive projects -> Intern in auto companies -> Specialize in vehicle design
Build physics & math fundamentals in school -> Learn CAD basics in college -> Work on design projects -> Intern in core companies -> Apply for design roles

children.name: Manufacturing & Production
children.description: Focuses on production processes, plant operations, and optimization of manufacturing systems in industries.

children.name: Production Engineer
children.description: Oversees manufacturing processes, ensuring efficiency, quality, and cost-effectiveness in production lines.

children.name: Process Engineer
children.description: Designs and optimizes manufacturing processes for efficiency and productivity.

children.name: Lean Manufacturing Specialist
children.description: Focuses on eliminating waste and improving efficiency using lean methodologies.
children.roadmap: Learn lean principles -> Work on plant improvements -> Get certifications -> Lead optimization projects
Learn process improvement tools -> Work on production data -> Implement optimizations -> Grow into process leadership

children.name: Quality Engineer
children.description: Ensures products meet quality standards and regulatory requirements.

children.name: Six Sigma Black Belt
children.description: Leads high-impact process improvement and quality initiatives.
children.roadmap: Gain quality experience -> Get Six Sigma certification -> Lead projects -> Move into senior roles
Learn quality tools -> Work in QA departments -> Conduct audits -> Move into quality leadership
Learn manufacturing basics -> Gain shop floor exposure -> Work in factories -> Move into supervisory roles

children.name: Core Mechanical Systems
children.description: Deals with thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, and energy systems used in industries like power plants, HVAC, and oil & gas.

children.name: Thermal Engineer
children.description: Works on heat transfer, thermodynamics, and energy systems such as engines and power plants.

children.name: HVAC Engineer
children.description: Designs heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems for buildings and industries.

children.name: Building Services Engineer
children.description: Designs and manages mechanical systems in buildings including HVAC, plumbing, and fire systems.
children.roadmap: Learn building systems -> Work on projects -> Gain site experience -> Move into consultancy roles
Learn HVAC systems -> Work on building projects -> Gain certifications -> Move into senior roles

children.name: Power Plant Engineer
children.description: Works in thermal, nuclear, or renewable power plants managing energy production systems.

children.name: Energy Analyst
children.description: Analyzes energy consumption and efficiency, focusing on optimization and sustainability.
children.roadmap: Learn energy systems -> Analyze data -> Work on sustainability projects -> Move into consulting
Learn power systems -> Join energy sector -> Gain plant experience -> Move into senior operations
Master core subjects -> Work on simulation tools -> Intern in energy sector -> Join core companies

children.name: Robotics & Automation
children.description: Combines mechanical engineering with electronics and software to build automated systems and intelligent machines.

children.name: Robotics Engineer
children.description: Designs and develops robots and automated systems for industries like manufacturing and healthcare.

children.name: Industrial Automation
children.description: Focuses on automating industrial processes using PLCs and control systems.

children.name: Automation Engineer
children.description: Designs and maintains automated production systems for efficiency and reliability.
children.roadmap: Gain automation skills -> Work on industrial systems -> Optimize processes -> Lead automation projects
Learn PLC/SCADA -> Work in factories -> Implement automation -> Move into senior roles

children.name: Mechatronics
children.description: Integrates mechanical, electrical, and software systems for advanced product development.

children.name: Robotics Systems Developer
children.description: Builds intelligent robotic systems integrating hardware and software.
children.roadmap: Learn robotics frameworks -> Build complex systems -> Work in R&D -> Move into advanced robotics
Learn interdisciplinary skills -> Build projects -> Work on smart systems -> Join R&D roles
Learn basics of robotics -> Build projects -> Work with Arduino/ROS -> Intern in robotics firms

children.name: Emerging & Interdisciplinary Fields
children.description: Modern career paths combining mechanical engineering with AI, sustainability, and advanced technologies.

children.name: EV (Electric Vehicle) Engineer
children.description: Works on electric vehicle systems including battery, motor, and powertrain design.

children.name: Battery Systems Engineer
children.description: Focuses on battery design, performance, and thermal management in EVs.

children.name: Energy Storage Specialist
children.description: Works on advanced energy storage technologies beyond EVs like grid storage.
children.roadmap: Learn energy storage tech -> Work on research projects -> Join advanced tech firms
Learn battery tech -> Work on EV systems -> Gain R&D exposure -> Move into advanced roles

children.name: AI in Mechanical Systems
children.description: Applies machine learning to predictive maintenance, optimization, and smart manufacturing.

children.name: Predictive Maintenance Engineer
children.description: Uses data and AI to predict failures in machines and reduce downtime.
children.roadmap: Learn ML + IoT -> Work on industrial data -> Build predictive systems -> Move into Industry 4.0 roles
Learn coding + ML -> Work on predictive models -> Integrate with mechanical systems -> Join smart manufacturing firms
Learn EV fundamentals -> Work on projects -> Intern in EV startups -> Join automotive firms

root.name: Urban Planning
root.description: Career paths for Urban Planning in India

children.name: Core Urban Planning
children.description: Focuses on designing and managing urban spaces, infrastructure, and land use to create sustainable, functional, and livable cities.

children.name: Urban Planner
children.description: Works on city layouts, zoning regulations, land use planning, and development strategies for urban and semi-urban areas.

children.name: Land Use Planner
children.description: Specializes in zoning, land allocation, and optimizing land resources for residential, commercial, and industrial use.

children.name: Zoning Specialist
children.description: Ensures compliance with zoning laws and assists in drafting zoning regulations for urban development.
children.roadmap: Study urban laws -> Work with planning authorities -> Draft zoning plans -> Move into policy advisory
Learn zoning regulations -> Work on land allocation projects -> Gain exposure to master plans -> Join consulting firms

children.name: Master Planning
children.description: Focuses on long-term city development plans including infrastructure, transportation, and sustainability.

children.name: City Development Planner
children.description: Designs comprehensive development strategies for cities, balancing growth, infrastructure, and sustainability.
children.roadmap: Gain planning experience -> Work on master plans -> Collaborate with governments -> Move into senior planning roles
Work on city-level projects -> Learn integrated planning -> Build portfolio -> Join large planning consultancies
Build planning fundamentals -> Learn GIS & mapping tools -> Work on studio projects -> Intern with planning firms -> Apply for planner roles

children.name: Transportation & Infrastructure Planning
children.description: Focuses on planning efficient transportation systems and infrastructure networks for cities.

children.name: Transportation Planner
children.description: Designs transport systems including roads, public transit, and traffic management solutions.

children.name: Traffic Engineer
children.description: Works on traffic flow optimization, signal systems, and road safety improvements.

children.name: Intelligent Transport Systems (ITS) Specialist
children.description: Uses technology to improve traffic management through sensors, AI, and smart systems.
children.roadmap: Learn ITS technologies -> Work on smart city projects -> Integrate tech with planning -> Move into smart mobility
Learn traffic modeling -> Work on real projects -> Analyze traffic data -> Move into advanced roles

children.name: Public Transit Planning
children.description: Designs metro, bus, and rail systems for efficient urban mobility.

children.name: Metro Rail Planner
children.description: Works on planning and expansion of metro rail networks in cities.
children.roadmap: Work on rail projects -> Understand large-scale infra -> Collaborate with agencies -> Move into leadership
Study transit systems -> Work on metro/bus projects -> Analyze ridership -> Move into senior transit roles
Learn transportation systems -> Work on traffic studies -> Use simulation tools -> Join infrastructure firms

children.name: Environmental & Sustainable Planning
children.description: Focuses on integrating sustainability, environmental protection, and climate resilience into urban development.

children.name: Environmental Planner
children.description: Works on minimizing environmental impact of urban projects and ensuring sustainable development.

children.name: Climate Resilience Planning
children.description: Focuses on designing cities that can withstand climate change impacts like floods and heatwaves.

children.name: Disaster Management Planner
children.description: Plans urban systems to handle disasters like floods, earthquakes, and cyclones.
children.roadmap: Learn disaster frameworks -> Work with agencies -> Plan mitigation systems -> Move into leadership
Study climate science -> Work on resilience projects -> Collaborate with NGOs/government -> Move into global roles

children.name: Sustainable Urban Design
children.description: Integrates green spaces, renewable energy, and eco-friendly practices into city planning.

children.name: Green Infrastructure Specialist
children.description: Designs eco-friendly infrastructure like parks, water systems, and green corridors.
children.roadmap: Learn ecological design -> Work on urban projects -> Build expertise -> Move into consultancy
Learn sustainability principles -> Work on green projects -> Build portfolio -> Join global firms
Learn environmental laws -> Work on impact assessments -> Join sustainability projects -> Grow into senior roles

children.name: Real Estate & Urban Development
children.description: Involves planning and managing real estate projects, urban expansion, and infrastructure development.

children.name: Real Estate Planner
children.description: Works on land development projects, feasibility studies, and real estate investment planning.

children.name: Urban Development Consultant
children.description: Advises on large-scale urban projects including townships and smart cities.

children.name: Smart City Consultant
children.description: Works on technology-driven urban projects integrating IoT, sustainability, and infrastructure.
children.roadmap: Learn smart city tech -> Work on government projects -> Build expertise -> Move into global roles
Gain consulting experience -> Work on urban projects -> Build network -> Move into senior advisory

children.name: Project Development
children.description: Focuses on execution of urban projects including planning, budgeting, and coordination.

children.name: Infrastructure Project Manager
children.description: Manages large infrastructure projects like roads, housing, and utilities.
children.roadmap: Gain project experience -> Lead teams -> Manage budgets -> Move into senior roles
Work with developers -> Handle projects -> Learn execution -> Move into leadership
Learn real estate basics -> Work on feasibility studies -> Join developers -> Move into project roles

children.name: Policy, Research & Governance
children.description: Focuses on urban policy-making, research, and governance to guide city development at institutional levels.

children.name: Urban Policy Analyst
children.description: Works on policy formulation, urban regulations, and governance frameworks.

children.name: Government Urban Planner
children.description: Works with government bodies on city planning, infrastructure, and development policies.

children.name: Town Planning Officer
children.description: Oversees planning and development activities within municipalities or regions.
children.roadmap: Join govt services -> Manage planning activities -> Gain administrative experience -> Move into higher posts
Prepare for govt exams -> Work in planning departments -> Gain experience -> Move into senior roles

children.name: Urban Researcher
children.description: Conducts research on urban issues like housing, mobility, and sustainability.

children.name: Academic / Professor
children.description: Teaches urban planning and conducts research in universities.
children.roadmap: Pursue masters/PhD -> Publish research -> Teach -> Move into senior academic roles
Work in research orgs -> Publish papers -> Build expertise -> Move into academia or policy
Learn policy frameworks -> Work with think tanks -> Conduct research -> Move into advisory roles
